case_title: JOSEPH BROOKS VS. AV ENERGY, LLC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-07-2018 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO DEC-12-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. . PLAINTIFF JOSEPH BROOKS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AV ENERGY IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY RANDALL ABCOCK, OPERATIONS DIRECTOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-18-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AV ENERGY, LLC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROOKS, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT AV ENERGY, LLC.
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BROOKS, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT AV ENERGY, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-07-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT AV ENERGY, LLC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF JOSEPH BROOKS. APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT AV ENERGY LLC REPRESENTED BY KPISH GOYAL, EMPLOYEE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROOKS, JOSEPH ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT AV ENERGY, LLC.
ORDER CASE DIMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
